title: Ubiquiti dual omni antenna airMAX 2x2 MIMO 5GHz, 10dBi, rocket kit
description: AMO-5G10 is 2x2 MIMO omnidirectional antenna with 10dBi gain, 360 °/12 ° beam angles and is designed for 5GHz band. It was designed to seamlessly integrate with Rocket M radio series. Plug and Play Integration Every airMAX ® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount, so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation. Package contains Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
